evals.name: flask-app-todo-sync
evals.prompt: Build me a simple Flask app with a landing page. Create the project structure and track all tasks in a todo list.
evals.expected_output: Project folder created with proper structure, todo list that syncs with file creation

assertions.name: todo_list_exists
assertions.check: Todo list file exists in todos/ folder

assertions.name: todo_synced_with_files
assertions.check: Todo list has tasks marked as completed after file creation

evals.name: react-component-todo-sync
evals.prompt: Create a React project with a Button component. Set up the project structure and track progress with todos.
evals.expected_output: React project with components folder, Button component, and synced todo list

assertions.name: folder_task_completed
assertions.check: Todo for creating components folder is marked completed

assertions.name: component_task_completed
assertions.check: Todo for creating Button component is marked completed

evals.name: file-deletion-todo-update
evals.prompt: I have a project at projects/test-app/ with an old file src/deprecated.py that needs to be removed. Delete it and update the todo list accordingly.
evals.expected_output: File deleted, todo list updated to reflect the deletion

assertions.name: todo_updated_on_deletion
assertions.check: Related todo task is marked as cancelled or updated
